mapper.select: select EHR_CD as ehrOrgCode, ERP_DEPART as erpDeptCode, EHR_CD as planOrgCode, ORG_CD as morgCode, ORG_NM as morgName, PAR_CD as parentMorgCode, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from ehr_org_manage_r

SELECT DISTINCT t.EHR_CD, t.EHR_NM, t.EHR_PAR_CD, t.EHR_PAR_NM, t.ORG_CD, t.CONTROL_LEVEL, t.BZ_LEVEL, '1' as NODE_LEVEL FROM ehr_org_manage_r t where t.EHR_CD != #{ehrCd} and year = #{year} and deleted = 0 START WITH t.EHR_CD = #{ehrCd} and year = #{year} and deleted = 0 CONNECT BY PRIOR t.EHR_PAR_CD = t.EHR_CD and year = #{year} and deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT t.EHR_CD, t.EHR_NM, t.EHR_PAR_CD, t.EHR_PAR_NM, t.ORG_CD, t.CONTROL_LEVEL, t.BZ_LEVEL, '-1' as NODE_LEVEL FROM ehr_org_manage_r t where t.EHR_CD != #{ehrCd} and year = #{year} and deleted = 0 START WITH t.EHR_CD = #{ehrCd} and year = #{year} and deleted = 0 CONNECT BY PRIOR t.EHR_CD = t.EHR_PAR_CD and year = #{year} and deleted = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE ehr_org_manage_r SET org_cd = #{orgCd}, updater = #{updater}, update_time = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id IN
#{id}

UPDATE ehr_org_manage_r SET control_level = #{controlLevel}, updater = #{updater}, update_time = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id IN
#{id}

UPDATE ehr_org_manage_r SET bz_level = #{bzLevel}, updater = #{updater}, update_time = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id IN
#{id}
UPDATE ehr_org_manage_r SET erp_depart = #{erpDepart}, updater = #{updater}, update_time = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: select org_cd as orgCd, org_nm as orgNm, par_cd as parCd, par_nm as parNm from ${dataIntegration}.VIEW_HSP_ENTITY

SELECT DISTINCT t.EHR_CD, t.EHR_NM, t.EHR_PAR_CD, t.EHR_PAR_NM, t.ORG_CD, t.CONTROL_LEVEL, t.BZ_LEVEL, '1' as NODE_LEVEL FROM ehr_org_manage_r t START WITH t.EHR_CD = #{ehrCd} and year = #{year} and deleted = 0 CONNECT BY PRIOR t.EHR_PAR_CD = t.EHR_CD and year = #{year} and deleted = 0

SELECT DISTINCT t.EHR_CD, t.EHR_NM, t.EHR_PAR_CD, t.EHR_PAR_NM, t.ORG_CD, t.CONTROL_LEVEL, t.BZ_LEVEL, '-1' as NODE_LEVEL FROM ehr_org_manage_r t where t.EHR_CD != #{ehrCd} and year = #{year} and deleted = 0 START WITH t.EHR_CD = #{ehrCd} and year = #{year} and deleted = 0 CONNECT BY PRIOR t.EHR_CD = t.EHR_PAR_CD and year = #{year} and deleted = 0

( select o.id as ehr_cd,o.org_name as ehr_nm,o.parent_id as ehr_par_cd,po.org_name ehr_par_nm,'1' as to_add from system_org o left join system_org po on o.parent_id = po.id and o.deleted = 0 and po.deleted = 0 MINUS select ehr_cd,ehr_nm,ehr_par_cd,ehr_par_nm,'1' as to_add from ehr_org_manage_r where year = #{year} and deleted = 0 ) union ( select ehr_cd,ehr_nm,ehr_par_cd,ehr_par_nm,'2' as to_add from ehr_org_manage_r where year = #{year} and deleted = 0 MINUS select o.id as ehr_cd,o.org_name as ehr_nm,o.parent_id as ehr_par_cd,po.org_name ehr_par_nm,'2' as to_add from system_org o left join system_org po on o.parent_id = po.id and o.deleted = 0 and po.deleted = 0 )
mapper.delete:
delete from ehr_org_manage_r where ehr_cd in
#{ehrCd}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id DESC) AS rn, id, org_cd, org_nm, ehr_cd, ehr_nm, ehr_par_cd, ehr_par_nm, control_level, bz_level, erp_depart, year, leaf, create_time, update_time, creator, updater, deleted FROM ehr_org_manage_r
deleted = 0
AND year = #{searchVo.year}
AND ehr_cd LIKE '%' || #{searchVo.ehrOrgKey} || '%'
AND (org_cd LIKE '%' || #{searchVo.manageOrgKey} || '%' OR org_nm LIKE '%' || #{searchVo.manageOrgKey} || '%')
AND erp_depart LIKE '%' || #{searchVo.erpDepart} || '%'
ORDER BY id DESC ) t WHERE t.rn BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT /*+ INDEX(ehr_org_manage_r IDX_EHR_ORG_YEAR_DELETED) */ COUNT(1) FROM ehr_org_manage_r
deleted = 0
AND year = #{searchVo.year}
AND ehr_cd LIKE '%' || #{searchVo.ehrOrgKey} || '%'
AND (org_cd LIKE '%' || #{searchVo.manageOrgKey} || '%' OR org_nm LIKE '%' || #{searchVo.manageOrgKey} || '%')
AND erp_depart LIKE '%' || #{searchVo.erpDepart} || '%'
